title: MD
biography: Paracelsus was a Swiss-German physician who founded toxicology and pioneered the use of chemicals and minerals in medicine. He established the principle that 'the dose makes the poison.'
aiSummary: Paracelsus is a medicine specialist at University of Basel. Based in Switzerland.

timeline.title: Established toxicology principles
timeline.description: Introduced the concept that any substance can be toxic depending on dose, founding the science of toxicology
